summary: Core logic is sound, but critical architectural flaw: tests are split across Pester (run locally) and inline workflow scripts (lines 25-85, run only in CI). Duplicate test scenarios (include+exclude together, multi-feature flags, 3×3 matrix) should be in Pester, not inline. Matrix size validation checks size before applying excludes—could reject valid matrices. Test harness parsing Pester output with 'Tests Passed: 10' regex may fail on actual output format. All tests in Pester should pass, but split testing strategy hurts maintainability significantly.
